steps.title: Focus on sequence
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the order of formation. The notes say Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago, while Pangaea formed about 300 million years ago, so the answer must compare their timing.

steps.title: Require both continents
steps.content: Choice B describes the supercontinent cycle generally without naming the two examples. Choice C identifies both as supercontinents but gives no order. Choice D mentions only Ur, so it cannot compare Ur with Pangaea. The remaining choice states the sequence between the two. The answer is A.
